title: corone nocturna
intro: Corone nocturna, also known as Night-blooming Jasmine or Queen of the Night, is a flowering plant native to the tropical regions of Central and South America. The medicinal properties of Corone nocturna include its ability to treat anxiety and insomnia due to its sedative and calming effects, as well as its antispasmodic and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of this plant include reducing stress and promoting relaxation, which can lead to improved sleep quality and overall well-being. Herbal preparations of Corone nocturna include teas, infusions, and tinctures that can be used to promote a restful night's sleep and alleviate symptoms of anxiety and stress.
